name: Above the Forest
description:
Below you the forest stretches out like a living carpet of green and gold.  
Staring out to the north, you are so overcome by a feeling of tranquility, that
you can almost forget that there is a terrible battle raging about this city.
But the distant rumble and thump of orcish war-drums shatter your illusion of
peace while you stand here admiring, people are shedding their life blood into
that beautiful green carpet.
